note: Baseline US OFAC comprehensive-sanctions jurisdictions (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). This is a STARTING POINT only. Operators MUST review against current OFAC programs with their own legal counsel before relying on it - sanctions change and obligations depend on the products/services you ship. Update version_date whenever the list is reviewed (even if unchanged) so the >review_cadence_days staleness check stays quiet.
